title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP U7-Pro-Max
description: Ubiquiti U7 Pro Max is the most powerful unit in the U7 series, naturally supporting Wi-Fi 7. It operates in the 2.4 GHz band at a speed of 688 Mb/s, in the 5 GHz band at an incredible speed of 8.6 Gb/s, and in the 6 GHz band at 5.7 Gb/s. Thanks to the triple band, the unit ensures excellent connectivity and wide coverage. For network connection, a LAN port with a speed of up to 2.5 Gb/s is available. The access point is powered via PoE+ To manage the device, it is necessary to download the original software called UniFi Network Controller from the official website, which allows you to control the entire network. The undeniable advantage of the UniFi Controller is that it is completely free without any restrictions ! This centralized management allows uploading maps and setting basic parameters as well as advanced features, such as SSID, guest account, welcome page, traffic statistics, and a list and status of associated… Device Wall mounts Drilling template Cable tie Mounting kit
